question: Define a `Book` class with private data members `title` (string), `author` (string), and `isbn` (string). Provide public getter methods `getTitle()`, `getAuthor()`, `getIsbn()`, and a `displayBookInfo()` method that prints all book details.

test_cases.expected:
--- Initial Book Info ---
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
ISBN: 978-0451524935

errors.message: Getter method 'getIsbn()' returns a non-const reference, allowing external modification of a private member, which violates encapsulation and the semantic intent of a getter.
